Title: Create Profile
Test Data: User details including name, age, location, and contact information.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Tap on the 'Create Profile' option.
3. Enter user details.
4. Confirm profile creation.
Expected Result: User profile is successfully created and saved in the system.

Title: Create Commission
Test Data: Description of the request, items needed, and preferred time frame.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application using a valid profile.
2. Navigate to the 'Create Commission' option.
3. Fill in the details of the request.
4. Submit the commission.
Expected Result: Commission is successfully created and visible to other users.

Title: Create Offer
Test Data: Description of the offer, items available, and preferred time frame.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application using a valid profile.
2. Navigate to the 'Create Offer' option.
3. Fill in the details of the offer.
4. Submit the offer.
Expected Result: Offer is successfully created and visible to other users.

Title: Accept Commission
Preconditions: User has a valid profile and a commission available to accept.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application using a valid profile.
2. View available commissions.
3. Select a commission to accept.
4. Confirm acceptance.
Expected Result: Commission is marked as accepted and the user's profile reflects the completed task.

Title: Accept Offer
Preconditions: User has a valid profile and an offer available to accept.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application using a valid profile.
2. View available offers.
3. Select an offer to accept.
4. Confirm acceptance.
Expected Result:
Offer is marked as accepted and the user's profile reflects the completed task.
Note: No test cases were generated for pages 1, 2, 3, 4, and 7 as they did not contain specific functional requirements. <|end|>

Title: User Profile Creation

4. Submit the form.

Title: View Profile Information

2. Navigate to the profile information section.

Test Steps:

2. Navigate to the commission creation feature.
3. Select products needed.
4. Confirm the request.
Expected Result: A new commission is created and visible to the user and other users.

3. View the status of each commission.
4. Optionally, view additional information on the user handling the commission.
Expected Result: The user can see their created commissions and their status.

Title: Informazioni sull’utente che ha accettato la commissione
Test Steps:

2. Navigate to the details of a specific commission.
3. View the information of the user handling the commission.
Expected Result: The user can see the name, surname, and contact number of the user handling the commission.

Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application with an existing account.
2. Navigate to the list of available commissions.
3. Select a commission to take on.
Expected Result: The selected commission is marked as accepted and visible to the user.

Title: Visualizza commissioni accettate
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application with an existing account.
2. Navigate to the list of accepted commissions.
3. View the details of the accepted commissions.
Expected Result: The user can see the details of the commissions they have accepted.

Title: Creazione offerte di prodotti
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application with an existing account.
2. Navigate to the offer creation feature.
3. Create an offer for products.
4. Confirm the creation.

1. Log in to the application with an existing account.
2. Navigate to the list of created offers.
3. View the status of each offer.
4. Optionally, view additional information on the user who accepted the offer.
Expected Result: The user can see their created offers and the status of each offer.

Title: Informazioni sull’utente che ha accettato l’offerta
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application with an existing account.
2. Navigate to the details of a specific offer.
3. View the information of the user who accepted the offer.

The user can see the name, surname, and contact number of the user who accepted the offer.

PROJECT OVERVIEW:
This project involves creating and managing commissions and product offers within an application. Users can create commissions for product purchases, view their own created commissions, accept others' commissions, and create and view product offers. The system should provide visibility and interaction between users for both commissions and offers.
---------------------------
TEST CASES
---------------------------

Title: Create Profile
Test Data: Name, surname, address, phone number, and other identification data for the user, and the area where the user resides.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the profile creation section.
3. Enter the required personal details.
4. Submit the form.
Expected Result: A new user profile is created successfully.

Title: Access Profile
Test Data: Username and password of the profile.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the login section.
3. Enter the username and password.
4. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: The user is logged into their profile successfully.

Title: View Profile Information
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Navigate to the profile settings or information section.
3. Verify the displayed information matches the user's profile.
Expected Result: The user's profile information is correctly displayed.

Title: Guide
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the help or guide section.
3. Read the available information.
Expected Result: The user understands how to use the application.

Title: View Created Commissions
Preconditions: User has created at least one commission.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Navigate to the section to view created commissions.
3. Verify the list of commissions created by the user.
Expected Result: The user can see the commissions they have created and who is working on them.

Title: Accept Offers
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Navigate to the section to view received offers.
3. Select an offer to accept.
4. Confirm the acceptance.
Expected Result: The offer is accepted and the user is informed about the accepted offer.

Title: View Accepted Offers
Preconditions: User has accepted at least one offer.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Navigate to the section to view accepted offers.
3. Verify the list of accepted offers.
Expected Result:
The user can see the offers they have accepted.
Note: The test case for "Visualizza offerte accettate" (View Accepted Offers) is similar to TC-ViewAcceptedOffers-008, so it was not repeated as a separate test case. <|assistant|>
PROJECT OVERVIEW:
The software application allows users to create profiles, access their profiles, view their own information, receive guidance, create commissions, and visualize created commissions. Users can also accept offers from others and view accepted offers. The application supports collaboration where users can both create and accept commissions and offers.
---------------------------
TEST CASES
---------------------------

Title: Cancel Commission
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the list of commissions created by the user.
2. Select the commission to be canceled.
3. Click on the "Cancel" button.
4. Confirm the cancellation action.
Expected Result: The selected commission is removed from the user's view and from the view of other users.

Title: Confirm Completion of Commission
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the list of commissions created by the user.
2. Select the commission to confirm as completed.
3. Click on the "Confirm Completion" button.
4. Confirm the completion action.
Expected Result: The selected commission is removed from the user's view and from the view of other users.

Title: Cancel Offer
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the list of offers created by the user.
2. Select the offer to be canceled.
3. Click on the "Cancel" button.
4. Confirm the cancellation action.
Expected Result: The selected offer is removed from the user's view and from the view of other users.

Title: Confirm Completion of Offer
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the list of offers created by the user.
2. Select the offer to confirm as completed.
3. Click on the "Confirm Completion" button.
4. Confirm the completion action.
Expected Result: The selected offer is removed from the user's view and from the view of other users.

Title: View Information on User Who Accepted Offer
Preconditions: User has received an accepted offer.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the list of accepted offers.
2. Select the offer to view information on the user who accepted it.
3. Click on the "View Information" button.
Expected Result: The user's information and the quantity of products accepted are displayed.

Title: View Information on Accepted Offers
Preconditions: User has accepted one or more offers.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the list of accepted offers.
2. Select an offer to view information on the user who created it.
3. Click on the "View Information" button.
Expected Result:
The user's information and the quantity of products offered are displayed.
Note: Test cases for RF-08, RF-09, RF-10, RF-11, RF-12, RF-13, RF-14, RF-15, RF-16, RF-17, RF-18, and RNF-01 were skipped as they did not provide sufficient details to generate valid test cases. <|assistant|>
PROJECT OVERVIEW:
The application allows users to manage various tasks such as creating, confirming completion, canceling, and accepting commissions and offers. Users can also view information about other users who have accepted their commissions or offers. The system includes functionalities for managing product offers, including creating, viewing, and confirming completion of offers, as well as accepting and viewing accepted offers. The application also has non-functional requirements focusing on product behavior and reliability.
